hero.subtitle:
A community-run sauna
in Amsterdam Noord

crowdfunding.heading: A sauna for the neighborhood
crowdfunding.body: We’re raising funds to make this community sauna happen. You can pre-buy punch cards or become an early member right away.

about.heading:
Building
our dream
about.para1: Löyly is a member-run sauna. We believe sauna should be accessible to everyone — a place to unwind, connect with neighbors, and care for your body and mind. That’s why we’re building an affordable, community-run sauna in Amsterdam Noord, hosted by volunteers.
about.para2: We’re converting a container at ’t Keerwater on the Buiksloterweg into a full sauna, shower, and changing room. The structure is up, insulation is in, and our second-hand sauna is custom-fitted and ready. We’re now in the final stretch — flooring, tiling, and finishing touches. Want to be part of it?

how.heading:
When Löyly
opens
how.step1Desc: Create an account to join our community.
how.step2Desc: When we reveal our start date, pick your membership or punch card.
how.step3Desc: Browse the schedule and book your spot. The address is shared upon confirmation.
how.step4Desc: Become a host or contribute in other ways.

contact.locationNote: Exact address shared upon booking confirmation.

Members.addFreePlanDescription: Choose a plan to assign to this member for free (e.g. for volunteering or exchange).
Members.addFreePlanAfter: After selecting, you will set an expiry date.
Members.paymentHistoryPending: Payment history will be available when Mollie integration is connected.

whoWeAre.heading: Who we are
whoWeAre.body: Buurtsauna Löyly is a community sauna located in Amsterdam Noord. We operate this booking platform to allow members to reserve time slots and manage their membership. You can reach us at

whatData.heading: What data we collect and why

account.label: Account information
account.body: When you register, we collect your email address, password (stored as a one-way hash), first name, and phone number. These are required to create your account and identify you as a member.

optional.label: Optional profile data
optional.body: Last name, gender, and emergency contact details (name and phone number) are optional. Emergency contact information is used only in the event of a medical situation during a session.

booking.label: Booking data
booking.body: We record which time slots you book and any cancellation reasons you provide. This is necessary to manage capacity and your membership credits.

payment.label: Payment data
payment.body: Payments are processed by Mollie. We store the status and history of your payments (success, failure, pending) but do not store your card or bank details — those are handled exclusively by Mollie.

email.label: Transactional emails
email.body: We send emails for booking confirmations, password resets, and membership renewal reminders. We do not send marketing emails.

legalBasis.heading: Legal basis
legalBasis.body: We process your data on the basis of <contract>contract</contract> — it is necessary to operate your membership and fulfil bookings. Emergency contact data is processed on the basis of your <consent>consent</consent>, which you can withdraw by removing it from your profile.

retention.heading: How long we keep your data
retention.body: We keep your account and booking history for as long as your membership is active. If you delete your account, your personal data is removed. Payment records may be retained for up to 7 years to meet Dutch bookkeeping requirements.

sharing.heading: Who we share your data with
sharing.mollie: our payment provider. Mollie processes payment transactions and is subject to their own privacy policy.
sharing.infomaniak: our hosting and email provider, based in Switzerland. Your data is stored on their servers and emails are sent through their mail service.
sharing.noSale: We do not sell your data or share it with any other third parties. Admins and hosts can see the member information needed to manage sessions (name, contact details for their sessions).

cookies.heading: Cookies
cookies.body: This platform uses a session cookie to keep you logged in, and a preference cookie to remember your chosen language (EN/NL). Both cookies are strictly necessary for the service to function and do not require your consent. We do not use analytics, advertising, or any other third-party cookies.

rights.heading: Your rights
rights.intro: Under the GDPR (AVG), you have the right to:
rights.access: Access the personal data we hold about you
rights.portable: Receive your data in a portable format
rights.object: Object to processing based on legitimate interest
rights.contact: To exercise any of these rights, email us at
rights.authority: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the

questions.heading: Questions
questions.body: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, contact us at
